label: P&L Estimate
description: Buy notional, sell notional, gas estimate, and net P&L estimate via KpiStrip with collapsible line breakdown.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No mock imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field.

0.7.note: Empty state present (steps.length===0 guard with informative message).

0.8.note: Context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass (0.6, 0.8 N/A for pure local-state context).

1.1.note: Data sourced from useBundlesData() hook (steps, totalCost, totalRevenue, estimatedGas, netPnl).

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() and derives hasDefiDesk from org scope.

1.3.note: Org filter adjusts template scope; P&L values derive from user-authored steps.

1.4.note: P&L is a derived display widget; client cascade not applicable.

1.5.note: P&L is a derived display widget; strategy cascade not applicable.

1.6.note: Empty org scope → hasDefiDesk=true → no restriction.

l1.notes: All checks pass. 1.4, 1.5 N/A for derived display widget.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live=real gas at 14.5 USD/tx; paper=halved gas (7.25 USD/tx, testnet); batch=readOnly but P&L display still visible.

3.2.note: Context reads isPaper from useExecutionMode(); estimatedGas = isPaper ? steps.length*7.25 : steps.length*14.5.

3.3.note: No order entry in P&L widget; batch mode only makes widget read-only (no mutation).

3.4.note: Human: verify batch/as-of indicator visible in surrounding layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode defined: gas estimate halved; P&L display reflects testnet gas cost.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in this widget or bundles context.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1, 3.2, 3.5, 3.6 complete. 3.3 N/A. Human must verify 3.4.

4.1.note: No buttons in this widget — display only.

4.3.note: Human: verify all 4 KPI metrics (buy notional, sell notional, gas, net P&L) display correctly.

4.4.note: Human: verify collapsible breakdown toggles correctly.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks inside widget render.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1, 4.2, 4.5, 4.6 pass. Human must complete 4.3, 4.4.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all bundle-based strategies that involve buy/sell legs (Flash Loan Arb, Basis Trade, DeFi Deleverage). Displays pre-execution P&L estimate for any multi-leg bundle.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. Semantic color classes (text-rose-400, text-emerald-400, text-amber-400) are design-system sentiment colors, not hardcoded values.

7.2.note: No mock imports in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file; all expensive derives memoized in data context.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[11px] (line 18) with text-caption and text-[10px] (line 72) with text-micro. Tokens landed in globals.css.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing values (p-[, m-[, gap-[).

8.3.note: Uses KpiStrip, CollapsibleSection (shared components), Separator from components/ui/*. No custom interactive divs.

8.4.note: No img without alt, no unlabeled inputs, no interactive divs without role. Widget is display-only.

8.5.note: Human: verify at minW=3, minH=2 — KpiStrip columns=4 should compress gracefully.

keepSeparate.rationale: P&L widget has a distinct visual class (KPI strip + collapsible breakdown) that should remain spatially separate from the step editor. Different minH contracts (2 vs 4) support independent resizing.

relationships.notes: Reads computed aggregates (totalCost, totalRevenue, estimatedGas, netPnl) from BundlesDataContext. Purely reactive — updates when any step changes.

dataContract.notes: P&L is computed client-side from user-entered step quantities and prices. Gas estimate uses static per-step constants from lib/config. In production, gas estimate should call chain RPC or gas oracle API on-demand.

gaps: Gas estimate uses static per-step constant (14.5 USD/tx) instead of live chain RPC data
No slippage or price impact estimate included in P&L calculation
coverage.notes: Widget is strategy-agnostic — displays P&L for any step configuration. Gaps are data quality issues, not widget bugs.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: bundle-pnl-widget.tsx:18 — text-[11px] used; bundle-pnl-widget.tsx:72 — text-[10px] used. No tailwind token exists for sub-xs sizes.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[11px] with text-caption (--text-caption, existing 11px token) and text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro, new 10px token) (2026-04-21)
